verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.     Beati immaculati in via,  qui ambulant in lege Domini.
verses.king_james: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beati qui scrutantur testimonia ejus ;  in toto corde exquirunt eum.
verses.king_james: Blessed are they that keep his testimonies, and that seek him with the whole heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non enim qui operantur iniquitatem  in viis ejus ambulaverunt.
verses.king_james: They also do no iniquity: they walk in his ways.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu mandasti mandata tua  custodiri nimis.
verses.king_james: Thou hast commanded us to keep thy precepts diligently.

verses.latin_vulgate: Utinam dirigantur viæ meæ  ad custodiendas justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: O that my ways were directed to keep thy statutes!

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc non confundar,  cum perspexero in omnibus mandatis tuis.
verses.king_james: Then shall I not be ashamed, when I have respect unto all thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi in directione cordis,  in eo quod didici judicia justitiæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֭וֹדְךָ בְּיֹ֣שֶׁר לֵבָ֑ב בְּ֝לׇמְדִ֗י מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: I will praise thee with uprightness of heart, when I shall have learned thy righteous judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justificationes tuas custodiam ;  non me derelinquas usquequaque.
verses.king_james: I will keep thy statutes: O forsake me not utterly.

verses.latin_vulgate: In quo corrigit adolescentior viam suam ?  in custodiendo sermones tuos.
verses.king_james: Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his way? by taking heed thereto according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: In toto corde meo exquisivi te ;  ne repellas me a mandatis tuis.
verses.king_james: With my whole heart have I sought thee: O let me not wander from thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: In corde meo abscondi eloquia tua,  ut non peccem tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭לִבִּי צָפַ֣נְתִּי אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ לְ֝מַ֗עַן לֹ֣א אֶחֱטָא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thy word have I hid in mine heart, that I might not sin against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus es, Domine ;  doce me justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: Blessed art thou, O Lord: teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: In labiis meis pronuntiavi omnia judicia oris tui.
verses.king_james: With my lips have I declared all the judgments of thy mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In via testimoniorum tuorum delectatus sum,  sicut in omnibus divitiis.
verses.king_james: I have rejoiced in the way of thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.

verses.latin_vulgate: In mandatis tuis exercebor,  et considerabo vias tuas.
verses.king_james: I will meditate in thy precepts, and have respect unto thy ways.

verses.latin_vulgate: In justificationibus tuis meditabor :  non obliviscar sermones tuos.
verses.king_james: I will delight myself in thy statutes: I will not forget thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Retribue servo tuo, vivifica me,  et custodiam sermones tuos.
verses.king_james: Deal bountifully with thy servant, that I may live, and keep thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Revela oculos meos,  et considerabo mirabilia de lege tua.
verses.king_james: Open thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Incola ego sum in terra :  non abscondas a me mandata tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֵּ֣ר אָנֹכִ֣י בָאָ֑רֶץ אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֥ר מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי מִצְוֺתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: I am a stranger in the earth: hide not thy commandments from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concupivit anima mea  desiderare justificationes tuas in omni tempore.
verses.king_james: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto thy judgments at all times.

verses.latin_vulgate: Increpasti superbos ;  maledicti qui declinant a mandatis tuis.
verses.king_james: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, which do err from thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aufer a me opprobrium et contemptum,  quia testimonia tua exquisivi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֣ל מֵ֭עָלַי חֶרְפָּ֣ה וָב֑וּז כִּ֖י עֵדֹתֶ֣יךָ נָצָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: Remove from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim sederunt principes, et adversum me loquebantur ;  servus autem tuus exercebatur in justificationibus tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֤ם יָשְׁב֣וּ שָׂ֭רִים בִּ֣י נִדְבָּ֑רוּ עַ֝בְדְּךָ֗ יָשִׂ֥יחַ בְּחֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Princes also did sit and speak against me: but thy servant did meditate in thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et testimonia tua meditatio mea est,  et consilium meum justificationes tuæ.
verses.king_james: Thy testimonies also are my delight and my counsellors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhæsit pavimento anima mea :  vivifica me secundum verbum tuum.
verses.king_james: My soul cleaveth unto the dust: quicken thou me according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vias meas enuntiavi, et exaudisti me ;  doce me justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: I have declared my ways, and thou heardest me: teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viam justificationum tuarum instrue me,  et exercebor in mirabilibus tuis.
verses.king_james: Make me to understand the way of thy precepts: so shall I talk of thy wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormitavit anima mea præ tædio :  confirma me in verbis tuis.
verses.king_james: My soul melteth for heaviness: strengthen thou me according unto thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viam iniquitatis amove a me,  et de lege tua miserere mei.
verses.king_james: Remove from me the way of lying: and grant me thy law graciously.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viam veritatis elegi ;  judicia tua non sum oblitus.
verses.king_james: I have chosen the way of truth: thy judgments have I laid before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhæsi testimoniis tuis, Domine ;  noli me confundere.
verses.king_james: I have stuck unto thy testimonies: O Lord, put me not to shame.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viam mandatorum tuorum cucurri,  cum dilatasti cor meum.
verses.king_james: I will run the way of thy commandments, when thou shalt enlarge my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Legem pone mihi, Domine, viam justificationum tuarum,  et exquiram eam semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹרֵ֣נִי יְ֭הֹוָה דֶּ֥רֶךְ חֻקֶּ֗יךָ וְאֶצְּרֶ֥נָּה עֵֽקֶב׃
verses.king_james: Teach me, O Lord, the way of thy statutes; and I shall keep it unto the end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Da mihi intellectum, et scrutabor legem tuam,  et custodiam illam in toto corde meo.
verses.king_james: Give me understanding, and I shall keep thy law; yea, I shall observe it with my whole heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deduc me in semitam mandatorum tuorum,  quia ipsam volui.
verses.king_james: Make me to go in the path of thy commandments; for therein do I delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclina cor meum in testimonia tua,  et non in avaritiam.
verses.king_james: Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Averte oculos meos, ne videant vanitatem ;  in via tua vivifica me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַעֲבֵ֣ר עֵ֭ינַי מֵרְא֣וֹת שָׁ֑וְא בִּדְרָכֶ֥ךָ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity; and quicken thou me in thy way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Statue servo tuo eloquium tuum  in timore tuo.
verses.king_james: Stablish thy word unto thy servant, who is devoted to thy fear.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amputa opprobrium meum quod suspicatus sum,  quia judicia tua jucunda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַעֲבֵ֣ר חֶ֭רְפָּתִי אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָגֹ֑רְתִּי כִּ֖י מִשְׁפָּטֶ֣יךָ טוֹבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Turn away my reproach which I fear: for thy judgments are good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce concupivi mandata tua :  in æquitate tua vivifica me.
verses.king_james: Behold, I have longed after thy precepts: quicken me in thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et veniat super me misericordia tua, Domine ;  salutare tuum secundum eloquium tuum.
verses.king_james: Let thy mercies come also unto me, O Lord, even thy salvation, according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondebo exprobrantibus mihi verbum,  quia speravi in sermonibus tuis.
verses.king_james: So shall I have wherewith to answer him that reproacheth me: for I trust in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ne auferas de ore meo verbum veritatis usquequaque,  quia in judiciis tuis supersperavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאַל־תַּצֵּ֬ל מִפִּ֣י דְבַר־אֱמֶ֣ת עַד־מְאֹ֑ד כִּ֖י לְמִשְׁפָּטֶ֣ךָ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I have hoped in thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et custodiam legem tuam semper,  in sæculum et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.king_james: So shall I keep thy law continually for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ambulabam in latitudine,  quia mandata tua exquisivi.
verses.king_james: And I will walk at liberty: for I seek thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et loquebar in testimoniis tuis in conspectu regum,  et non confundebar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲדַבְּרָ֣ה בְ֭עֵדֹתֶיךָ נֶ֥גֶד מְלָכִ֗ים וְלֹ֣א אֵבֽוֹשׁ׃
verses.king_james: I will speak of thy testimonies also before kings, and will not be ashamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et meditabar in mandatis tuis,  quæ dilexi.
verses.king_james: And I will delight myself in thy commandments, which I have loved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et levavi manus meas ad mandata tua, quæ dilexi,  et exercebar in justificationibus tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶשָּֽׂא־כַפַּ֗י אֶֽל־מִ֭צְוֺתֶיךָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אָהָ֗בְתִּי וְאָשִׂ֥יחָה בְחֻקֶּֽיךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: My hands also will I lift up unto thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor esto verbi tui servo tuo,  in quo mihi spem dedisti.
verses.king_james: Remember the word unto thy servant, upon which thou hast caused me to hope.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc me consolata est in humilitate mea,  quia eloquium tuum vivificavit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֣את נֶחָמָתִ֣י בְעׇנְיִ֑י כִּ֖י אִמְרָתְךָ֣ חִיָּֽתְנִי׃
verses.king_james: This is my comfort in my affliction: for thy word hath quickened me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Superbi inique agebant usquequaque ;  a lege autem tua non declinavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֵ֭דִים הֱלִיצֻ֣נִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד מִ֝תּ֥וֹרָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א נָטִֽיתִי׃
verses.king_james: The proud have had me greatly in derision: yet have I not declined from thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor fui judiciorum tuorum a sæculo, Domine,  et consolatus sum.
verses.king_james: I remembered thy judgments of old, O Lord; and have comforted myself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Defectio tenuit me,  pro peccatoribus derelinquentibus legem tuam.
verses.king_james: Horror hath taken hold upon me because of the wicked that forsake thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantabiles mihi erant justificationes tuæ  in loco peregrinationis meæ.
verses.king_james: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor fui nocte nominis tui, Domine,  et custodivi legem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָ֘כַ֤רְתִּי בַלַּ֣יְלָה שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֑ה וָ֝אֶשְׁמְרָ֗ה תּוֹרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: I have remembered thy name, O Lord, in the night, and have kept thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc facta est mihi,  quia justificationes tuas exquisivi.
verses.king_james: This I had, because I kept thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Portio mea, Domine,  dixi custodire legem tuam.
verses.king_james: Thou art my portion, O Lord: I have said that I would keep thy words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deprecatus sum faciem tuam in toto corde meo ;  miserere mei secundum eloquium tuum.
verses.king_james: I intreated thy favour with my whole heart: be merciful unto me according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cogitavi vias meas,  et converti pedes meos in testimonia tua.
verses.king_james: I thought on my ways, and turned my feet unto thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Paratus sum, et non sum turbatus,  ut custodiam mandata tua.
verses.king_james: I made haste, and delayed not to keep thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Funes peccatorum circumplexi sunt me,  et legem tuam non sum oblitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶבְלֵ֣י רְשָׁעִ֣ים עִוְּדֻ֑נִי תּ֥֝וֹרָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: The bands of the wicked have robbed me: but I have not forgotten thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Media nocte surgebam ad confitendum tibi,  super judicia justificationis tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲצֽוֹת־לַ֗יְלָה אָ֭קוּם לְהוֹד֣וֹת לָ֑ךְ עַ֝֗ל מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto thee because of thy righteous judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Particeps ego sum omnium timentium te,  et custodientium mandata tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָבֵ֣ר אָ֭נִי לְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר יְרֵא֑וּךָ וּ֝לְשֹׁמְרֵ֗י פִּקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: I am a companion of all them that fear thee, and of them that keep thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misericordia tua, Domine, plena est terra ;  justificationes tuas doce me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַסְדְּךָ֣ יְ֭הֹוָה מָלְאָ֥ה הָאָ֗רֶץ חֻקֶּ֥יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The earth, O Lord, is full of thy mercy: teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonitatem fecisti cum servo tuo, Domine,  secundum verbum tuum.
verses.king_james: Thou hast dealt well with thy servant, O Lord, according unto thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonitatem, et disciplinam, et scientiam doce me,  quia mandatis tuis credidi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֤וּב טַ֣עַם וָדַ֣עַת לַמְּדֵ֑נִי כִּ֖י בְמִצְוֺתֶ֣יךָ הֶאֱמָֽנְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: Teach me good judgment and knowledge: for I have believed thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Priusquam humiliarer ego deliqui :  propterea eloquium tuum custodivi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֶ֣רֶם אֶ֭עֱנֶה אֲנִ֣י שֹׁגֵ֑ג וְ֝עַתָּ֗ה אִמְרָתְךָ֥ שָׁמָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: Before I was afflicted I went astray: but now have I kept thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonus es tu, et in bonitate tua  doce me justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicata est super me iniquitas superborum ;  ego autem in toto corde meo scrutabor mandata tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טָפְל֬וּ עָלַ֣י שֶׁ֣קֶר זֵדִ֑ים אֲ֝נִ֗י בְּכׇל־לֵ֤ב ׀ אֶצֹּ֬ר פִּקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: The proud have forged a lie against me: but I will keep thy precepts with my whole heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Coagulatum est sicut lac cor eorum ;  ego vero legem tuam meditatus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טָפַ֣שׁ כַּחֵ֣לֶב לִבָּ֑ם אֲ֝נִ֗י תּוֹרָתְךָ֥ שִׁעֲשָֽׁעְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: Their heart is as fat as grease; but I delight in thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonum mihi quia humiliasti me,  ut discam justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: It is good for me that I have been afflicted; that I might learn thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonum mihi lex oris tui,  super millia auri et argenti.
verses.king_james: The law of thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus tuæ fecerunt me, et plasmaverunt me :  da mihi intellectum, et discam mandata tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָדֶ֣יךָ עָ֭שׂוּנִי וַֽיְכוֹנְנ֑וּנִי הֲ֝בִינֵ֗נִי וְאֶלְמְדָ֥ה מִצְוֺתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thy hands have made me and fashioned me: give me understanding, that I may learn thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui timent te videbunt me et lætabuntur,  quia in verba tua supersperavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭רֵאֶיךָ יִרְא֣וּנִי וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ כִּ֖י לִדְבָרְךָ֣ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: They that fear thee will be glad when they see me; because I have hoped in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cognovi, Domine, quia æquitas judicia tua,  et in veritate tua humiliasti me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָדַ֣עְתִּי יְ֭הֹוָה כִּי־צֶ֣דֶק מִשְׁפָּטֶ֑יךָ וֶ֝אֱמוּנָ֗ה עִנִּיתָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: I know, O Lord, that thy judgments are right, and that thou in faithfulness hast afflicted me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat misericordia tua ut consoletur me,  secundum eloquium tuum servo tuo.
verses.king_james: Let, I pray thee, thy merciful kindness be for my comfort, according to thy word unto thy servant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veniant mihi miserationes tuæ, et vivam,  quia lex tua meditatio mea est.
verses.king_james: Let thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live: for thy law is my delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur superbi, quia injuste iniquitatem fecerunt in me ;  ego autem exercebor in mandatis tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ זֵ֭דִים כִּי־שֶׁ֣קֶר עִוְּת֑וּנִי אֲ֝נִ֗י אָשִׂ֥יחַ בְּפִקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Let the proud be ashamed; for they dealt perversely with me without a cause: but I will meditate in thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertantur mihi timentes te,  et qui noverunt testimonia tua.
verses.king_james: Let those that fear thee turn unto me, and those that have known thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat cor meum immaculatum in justificationibus tuis,  ut non confundar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־לִבִּ֣י תָמִ֣ים בְּחֻקֶּ֑יךָ לְ֝מַ֗עַן לֹ֣א אֵבֽוֹשׁ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Let my heart be sound in thy statutes; that I be not ashamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Defecit in salutare tuum anima mea,  et in verbum tuum supersperavi.
verses.king_james: My soul fainteth for thy salvation: but I hope in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Defecerunt oculi mei in eloquium tuum,  dicentes : Quando consolaberis me ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כָּל֣וּ עֵ֭ינַי לְאִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ לֵ֝אמֹ֗ר מָתַ֥י תְּֽנַחֲמֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Mine eyes fail for thy word, saying, When wilt thou comfort me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia factus sum sicut uter in pruina ;  justificationes tuas non sum oblitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הָ֭יִיתִי כְּנֹ֣אד בְּקִיט֑וֹר חֻ֝קֶּ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: For I am become like a bottle in the smoke; yet do I not forget thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quot sunt dies servi tui ?  quando facies de persequentibus me judicium ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּמָּ֥ה יְמֵֽי־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ מָתַ֬י תַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה בְרֹדְפַ֣י מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: How many are the days of thy servant? when wilt thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Narraverunt mihi iniqui fabulationes,  sed non ut lex tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כָּרוּ־לִ֣י זֵדִ֣ים שִׁיח֑וֹת אֲ֝שֶׁ֗ר לֹ֣א כְתוֹרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: The proud have digged pits for me, which are not after thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia mandata tua veritas :  inique persecuti sunt me, adjuva me.
verses.king_james: All thy commandments are faithful: they persecute me wrongfully; help thou me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Paulominus consummaverunt me in terra ;  ego autem non dereliqui mandata tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֭מְעַט כִּלּ֣וּנִי בָאָ֑רֶץ וַ֝אֲנִ֗י לֹא־עָזַ֥בְתִּי פִקֻּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but I forsook not thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundum misericordiam tuam vivifica me,  et custodiam testimonia oris tui.
verses.king_james: Quicken me after thy lovingkindness; so shall I keep the testimony of thy mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In æternum, Domine,  verbum tuum permanet in cælo.
verses.king_james: For ever, O Lord, thy word is settled in heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: In generationem et generationem veritas tua ;  fundasti terram, et permanet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדֹ֣ר וָ֭דֹר אֱמוּנָתֶ֑ךָ כּוֹנַ֥נְתָּֽ אֶ֝֗רֶץ וַֽתַּעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations: thou hast established the earth, and it abideth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ordinatione tua perseverat dies,  quoniam omnia serviunt tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽ֭מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ עָמְד֣וּ הַיּ֑וֹם כִּ֖י הַכֹּ֣ל עֲבָדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: They continue this day according to thine ordinances: for all are thy servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nisi quod lex tua meditatio mea est,  tunc forte periissem in humilitate mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לוּלֵ֣י ת֭וֹרָתְךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָ֑י אָ֝֗ז אָבַ֥דְתִּי בְעׇנְיִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Unless thy law had been my delights, I should then have perished in mine affliction.

verses.latin_vulgate: In æternum non obliviscar justificationes tuas,  quia in ipsis vivificasti me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭עוֹלָם לֹא־אֶשְׁכַּ֣ח פִּקּוּדֶ֑יךָ כִּ֥י בָ֝֗ם חִיִּיתָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: I will never forget thy precepts: for with them thou hast quickened me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tuus sum ego ; salvum me fac :  quoniam justificationes tuas exquisivi.
verses.king_james: I am thine, save me; for I have sought thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Me exspectaverunt peccatores ut perderent me ;  testimonia tua intellexi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֤י קִוּ֣וּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים לְאַבְּדֵ֑נִי עֵ֝דֹתֶ֗יךָ אֶתְבּוֹנָֽן׃
verses.king_james: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me: but I will consider thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis consummationis vidi finem,  latum mandatum tuum nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽכׇל־תִּ֭כְלָה רָאִ֣יתִי קֵ֑ץ רְחָבָ֖ה מִצְוָתְךָ֣ מְאֹֽד׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I have seen an end of all perfection: but thy commandment is exceeding broad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo dilexi legem tuam, Domine !  tota die meditatio mea est.
verses.king_james: O how love I thy law! it is my meditation all the day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super inimicos meos prudentem me fecisti mandato tuo,  quia in æternum mihi est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵֽ֭אֹיְבַי תְּחַכְּמֵ֣נִי מִצְוֺתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם הִיא־לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Thou through thy commandments hast made me wiser than mine enemies: for they are ever with me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super omnes docentes me intellexi,  quia testimonia tua meditatio mea est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִכׇּל־מְלַמְּדַ֥י הִשְׂכַּ֑לְתִּי כִּ֥י עֵ֝דְוֺתֶ֗יךָ שִׂ֣יחָה לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I have more understanding than all my teachers: for thy testimonies are my meditation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super senes intellexi,  quia mandata tua quæsivi.
verses.king_james: I understand more than the ancients, because I keep thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab omni via mala prohibui pedes meos,  ut custodiam verba tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִכׇּל־אֹ֣רַח רָ֭ע כָּלִ֣אתִי רַגְלָ֑י לְ֝מַ֗עַן אֶשְׁמֹ֥ר דְּבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, that I might keep thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: A judiciis tuis non declinavi,  quia tu legem posuisti mihi.
verses.king_james: I have not departed from thy judgments: for thou hast taught me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam dulcia faucibus meis eloquia tua !  super mel ori meo.
verses.king_james: How sweet are thy words unto my taste! yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!

verses.latin_vulgate: A mandatis tuis intellexi ;  propterea odivi omnem viam iniquitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִפִּקּוּדֶ֥יךָ אֶתְבּוֹנָ֑ן עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן שָׂנֵ֤אתִי ׀ כׇּל־אֹ֬רַח שָֽׁקֶר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Through thy precepts I get understanding: therefore I hate every false way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lucerna pedibus meis verbum tuum,  et lumen semitis meis.
verses.king_james: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juravi et statui  custodire judicia justitiæ tuæ.
verses.king_james: I have sworn, and I will perform it, that I will keep thy righteous judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Humiliatus sum usquequaque, Domine ;  vivifica me secundum verbum tuum.
verses.king_james: I am afflicted very much: quicken me, O Lord, according unto thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Voluntaria oris mei beneplacita fac, Domine,  et judicia tua doce me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִדְב֣וֹת פִּ֭י רְצֵה־נָ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה וּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Accept, I beseech thee, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O Lord, and teach me thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anima mea in manibus meis semper,  et legem tuam non sum oblitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְשִׁ֣י בְכַפִּ֣י תָמִ֑יד וְ֝ת֥וֹרָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: My soul is continually in my hand: yet do I not forget thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuerunt peccatores laqueum mihi,  et de mandatis tuis non erravi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָתְנ֬וּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים פַּ֣ח לִ֑י וּ֝מִפִּקּוּדֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א תָעִֽיתִי׃
verses.king_james: The wicked have laid a snare for me: yet I erred not from thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæreditate acquisivi testimonia tua in æternum,  quia exsultatio cordis mei sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָחַ֣לְתִּי עֵדְוֺתֶ֣יךָ לְעוֹלָ֑ם כִּֽי־שְׂשׂ֖וֹן לִבִּ֣י הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.king_james: Thy testimonies have I taken as an heritage for ever: for they are the rejoicing of my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclinavi cor meum ad faciendas justificationes tuas in æternum,  propter retributionem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָטִ֣יתִי לִ֭בִּי לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת חֻקֶּ֗יךָ לְעוֹלָ֥ם עֵֽקֶב׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I have inclined mine heart to perform thy statutes alway, even unto the end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iniquos odio habui,  et legem tuam dilexi.
verses.king_james: I hate vain thoughts: but thy law do I love.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjutor et susceptor meus es tu,  et in verbum tuum supersperavi.
verses.king_james: Thou art my hiding place and my shield: I hope in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Declinate a me, maligni,  et scrutabor mandata Dei mei.
verses.king_james: Depart from me, ye evildoers: for I will keep the commandments of my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscipe me secundum eloquium tuum, et vivam,  et non confundas me ab exspectatione mea.
verses.king_james: Uphold me according unto thy word, that I may live: and let me not be ashamed of my hope.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjuva me, et salvus ero,  et meditabor in justificationibus tuis semper.
verses.king_james: Hold thou me up, and I shall be safe: and I will have respect unto thy statutes continually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sprevisti omnes discedentes a judiciis tuis,  quia injusta cogitatio eorum.
verses.king_james: Thou hast trodden down all them that err from thy statutes: for their deceit is falsehood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prævaricantes reputavi omnes peccatores terræ ;  ideo dilexi testimonia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סִגִ֗ים הִשְׁבַּ֥תָּ כׇל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָ֑רֶץ לָ֝כֵ֗ן אָהַ֥בְתִּי עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross: therefore I love thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confige timore tuo carnes meas ;  a judiciis enim tuis timui.
verses.king_james: My flesh trembleth for fear of thee; and I am afraid of thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Feci judicium et justitiam :  non tradas me calumniantibus me.
verses.king_james: I have done judgment and justice: leave me not to mine oppressors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscipe servum tuum in bonum :  non calumnientur me superbi.
verses.king_james: Be surety for thy servant for good: let not the proud oppress me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi mei defecerunt in salutare tuum,  et in eloquium justitiæ tuæ.
verses.king_james: Mine eyes fail for thy salvation, and for the word of thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fac cum servo tuo secundum misericordiam tuam,  et justificationes tuas doce me.
verses.king_james: Deal with thy servant according unto thy mercy, and teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Servus tuus sum ego : da mihi intellectum,  ut sciam testimonia tua.
verses.king_james: I am thy servant; give me understanding, that I may know thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus faciendi, Domine :  dissipaverunt legem tuam.
verses.king_james: It is time for thee, Lord, to work: for they have made void thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ideo dilexi mandata tua  super aurum et topazion.
verses.king_james: Therefore I love thy commandments above gold; yea, above fine gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea ad omnia mandata tua dirigebar ;  omnem viam iniquam odio habui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ כׇּל־פִּקּ֣וּדֵי כֹ֣ל יִשָּׁ֑רְתִּי כׇּל־אֹ֖רַח שֶׁ֣קֶר שָׂנֵֽאתִי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Therefore I esteem all thy precepts concerning all things to be right; and I hate every false way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mirabilia testimonia tua :  ideo scrutata est ea anima mea.
verses.king_james: Thy testimonies are wonderful: therefore doth my soul keep them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Declaratio sermonum tuorum illuminat,  et intellectum dat parvulis.
verses.king_james: The entrance of thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os meum aperui, et attraxi spiritum :  quia mandata tua desiderabam.
verses.king_james: I opened my mouth, and panted: for I longed for thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aspice in me, et miserere mei,  secundum judicium diligentium nomen tuum.
verses.king_james: Look thou upon me, and be merciful unto me, as thou usest to do unto those that love thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gressus meos dirige secundum eloquium tuum,  et non dominetur mei omnis injustitia.
verses.king_james: Order my steps in thy word: and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redime me a calumniis hominum  ut custodiam mandata tua.
verses.king_james: Deliver me from the oppression of man: so will I keep thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Faciem tuam illumina super servum tuum,  et doce me justificationes tuas.
verses.king_james: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant; and teach me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exitus aquarum deduxerunt oculi mei,  quia non custodierunt legem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פַּלְגֵי־מַ֭יִם יָרְד֣וּ עֵינָ֑י עַ֝֗ל לֹא־שָׁמְר֥וּ תוֹרָתֶֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Rivers of waters run down mine eyes, because they keep not thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus es, Domine,  et rectum judicium tuum.
verses.king_james: Righteous art thou, O Lord, and upright are thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mandasti justitiam testimonia tua,  et veritatem tuam nimis.
verses.king_james: Thy testimonies that thou hast commanded are righteous and very faithful.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tabescere me fecit zelus meus,  quia obliti sunt verba tua inimici mei.
verses.king_james: My zeal hath consumed me, because mine enemies have forgotten thy words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ignitum eloquium tuum vehementer,  et servus tuus dilexit illud.
verses.king_james: Thy word is very pure: therefore thy servant loveth it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adolescentulus sum ego et contemptus ;  justificationes tuas non sum oblitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צָעִ֣יר אָנֹכִ֣י וְנִבְזֶ֑ה פִּ֝קֻּדֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: I am small and despised: yet do not I forget thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia tua, justitia in æternum,  et lex tua veritas.
verses.king_james: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and thy law is the truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribulatio et angustia invenerunt me ;  mandata tua meditatio mea est.
verses.king_james: Trouble and anguish have taken hold on me: yet thy commandments are my delights.

verses.latin_vulgate: Æquitas testimonia tua in æternum :  intellectum da mihi, et vivam.
verses.king_james: The righteousness of thy testimonies is everlasting: give me understanding, and I shall live.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamavi in toto corde meo : exaudi me, Domine ;  justificationes tuas requiram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָרָ֣אתִי בְכׇל־לֵ֭ב עֲנֵ֥נִי יְהֹוָ֗ה חֻקֶּ֥יךָ אֶצֹּֽרָה׃
verses.king_james: I cried with my whole heart; hear me, O Lord: I will keep thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamavi ad te ; salvum me fac :  ut custodiam mandata tua.
verses.king_james: I cried unto thee; save me, and I shall keep thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præveni in maturitate, et clamavi :  quia in verba tua supersperavi.
verses.king_james: I prevented the dawning of the morning, and cried: I hoped in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prævenerunt oculi mei ad te diluculo,  ut meditarer eloquia tua.
verses.king_james: Mine eyes prevent the night watches, that I might meditate in thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocem meam audi secundum misericordiam tuam, Domine,  et secundum judicium tuum vivifica me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֭וֹלִי שִׁמְעָ֣ה כְחַסְדֶּ֑ךָ יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כְּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥ךָ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Hear my voice according unto thy lovingkindness: O Lord, quicken me according to thy judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Appropinquaverunt persequentes me iniquitati :  a lege autem tua longe facti sunt.
verses.king_james: They draw nigh that follow after mischief: they are far from thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prope es tu, Domine,  et omnes viæ tuæ veritas.
verses.king_james: Thou art near, O Lord; and all thy commandments are truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Initio cognovi de testimoniis tuis,  quia in æternum fundasti ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קֶ֣דֶם יָ֭דַעְתִּי מֵעֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם יְסַדְתָּֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Concerning thy testimonies, I have known of old that thou hast founded them for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vide humilitatem meam, et eripe me,  quia legem tuam non sum oblitus.
verses.king_james: Consider mine affliction, and deliver me: for I do not forget thy law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judica judicium meum, et redime me :  propter eloquium tuum vivifica me.
verses.king_james: Plead my cause, and deliver me: quicken me according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Longe a peccatoribus salus,  quia justificationes tuas non exquisierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָח֣וֹק מֵרְשָׁעִ֣ים יְשׁוּעָ֑ה כִּי־חֻ֝קֶּ֗יךָ לֹ֣א דָרָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.king_james: Salvation is far from the wicked: for they seek not thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misericordiæ tuæ multæ, Domine ;  secundum judicium tuum vivifica me.
verses.king_james: Great are thy tender mercies, O Lord: quicken me according to thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multi qui persequuntur me, et tribulant me ;  a testimoniis tuis non declinavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֭בִּים רֹדְפַ֣י וְצָרָ֑י מֵ֝עֵדְוֺתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א נָטִֽיתִי׃
verses.king_james: Many are my persecutors and mine enemies; yet do I not decline from thy testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi prævaricantes et tabescebam,  quia eloquia tua non custodierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאִ֣יתִי בֹ֭גְדִים וָאֶתְקוֹטָ֑טָה אֲשֶׁ֥ר אִ֝מְרָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁמָֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: I beheld the transgressors, and was grieved; because they kept not thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vide quoniam mandata tua dilexi, Domine :  in misericordia tua vivifica me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְ֭אֵה כִּי־פִקּוּדֶ֣יךָ אָהָ֑בְתִּי יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כְּֽחַסְדְּךָ֥ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Consider how I love thy precepts: quicken me, O Lord, according to thy lovingkindness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principium verborum tuorum veritas ;  in æternum omnia judicia justitiæ tuæ.
verses.king_james: Thy word is true from the beginning: and every one of thy righteous judgments endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principes persecuti sunt me gratis,  et a verbis tuis formidavit cor meum.
verses.king_james: Princes have persecuted me without a cause: but my heart standeth in awe of thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætabor ego super eloquia tua,  sicut qui invenit spolia multa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂ֣שׂ אָ֭נֹכִי עַל־אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ כְּ֝מוֹצֵ֗א שָׁלָ֥ל רָֽב׃
verses.king_james: I rejoice at thy word, as one that findeth great spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iniquitatem odio habui, et abominatus sum,  legem autem tuam dilexi.
verses.king_james: I hate and abhor lying: but thy law do I love.

verses.latin_vulgate: Septies in die laudem dixi tibi,  super judicia justitiæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֣בַע בַּ֭יּוֹם הִלַּלְתִּ֑יךָ עַ֝֗ל מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pax multa diligentibus legem tuam,  et non est illis scandalum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁל֣וֹם רָ֭ב לְאֹהֲבֵ֣י תוֹרָתֶ֑ךָ וְאֵֽין־לָ֥מוֹ מִכְשֽׁוֹל׃
verses.king_james: Great peace have they which love thy law: and nothing shall offend them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exspectabam salutare tuum, Domine,  et mandata tua dilexi.
verses.king_james: Lord, I have hoped for thy salvation, and done thy commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodivit anima mea testimonia tua,  et dilexit ea vehementer.
verses.king_james: My soul hath kept thy testimonies; and I love them exceedingly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Servavi mandata tua et testimonia tua,  quia omnes viæ meæ in conspectu tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֣רְתִּי פִ֭קּוּדֶיךָ וְעֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י כׇל־דְּרָכַ֣י נֶגְדֶּֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I have kept thy precepts and thy testimonies: for all my ways are before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Appropinquet deprecatio mea in conspectu tuo, Domine ;  juxta eloquium tuum da mihi intellectum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּקְרַ֤ב רִנָּתִ֣י לְפָנֶ֣יךָ יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּדְבָרְךָ֥ הֲבִינֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Let my cry come near before thee, O Lord: give me understanding according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intret postulatio mea in conspectu tuo ;  secundum eloquium tuum eripe me.
verses.king_james: Let my supplication come before thee: deliver me according to thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eructabunt labia mea hymnum,  cum docueris me justificationes tuas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּבַּ֣עְנָה שְׂפָתַ֣י תְּהִלָּ֑ה כִּ֖י תְלַמְּדֵ֣נִי חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: My lips shall utter praise, when thou hast taught me thy statutes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pronuntiabit lingua mea eloquium tuum,  quia omnia mandata tua æquitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֣עַן לְ֭שׁוֹנִי אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֖י כׇל־מִצְוֺתֶ֣יךָ צֶּֽדֶק׃
verses.king_james: My tongue shall speak of thy word: for all thy commandments are righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat manus tua ut salvet me,  quoniam mandata tua elegi.
verses.king_james: Let thine hand help me; for I have chosen thy precepts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concupivi salutare tuum, Domine,  et lex tua meditatio mea est.
verses.king_james: I have longed for thy salvation, O Lord; and thy law is my delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vivet anima mea, et laudabit te,  et judicia tua adjuvabunt me.
verses.king_james: Let my soul live, and it shall praise thee; and let thy judgments help me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erravi sicut ovis quæ periit : quære servum tuum,  quia mandata tua non sum oblitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּעִ֗יתִי כְּשֶׂ֣ה אֹ֭בֵד בַּקֵּ֣שׁ עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י מִ֝צְוֺתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek thy servant; for I do not forget thy commandments.
